2379580.name: CargoSpace
2379580.description:
Deliver packages in a world torn by goddesses. Working for Cargon they guarantee your package will arrive no matter what hazards! Take off in the (relatively) new Cargon standard transport ship and tackle the hazards inside the thick space surrounding drop off locations.

When your environment gets dangerous, it's up to your wits, quick thinking, and skill to repair your ship. Not only will you have to survive your trip, you must also deliver your packages quickly to earn a higher paycheck!

FEATURES:

  • Travel through selected trade routes to deliver goods! - With 7 sectors containing 3 levels each, there will be many different areas and challenges for you to face!  

  • Avoid hazards such as asteroids and space bugs... - From space bugs to electric moons, many unique hazards will damage your ship in distinct ways.

  • Manage your ships resources to survive your trip. - Repair your ship by playing small micro games! You can even manage your ship's resources while it's moving! Be careful though, as while your ship can move it cant steer clear without you!

  • Traverse the harsh environment created by the Goddesses!

Good luck Phoenix!
2379580.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
